Source: Perplexity API Changelog
URL: https://docs.perplexity.ai/changelog
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Perplexity API Changelog

## February 2026
- Agent API launched with production-ready guidance and OpenAI compatibility
- Embeddings API released with standard and contextualized embeddings

## December 2025
- sonar-reasoning model deprecated (use sonar-reasoning-pro)
- Media Classifier for automatic visual content detection
- Search API: max_tokens parameter, last_updated_filter, Vercel AI SDK compatibility

## November 2025
- Pro Search GA with automated tool usage and multi-step reasoning
- MCP Server one-click installation for Cursor, VS Code, Claude Desktop

## October 2025
- Official Python and TypeScript SDKs released
- Interactive Search API Playground (no API key needed)
- New search parameters: language_preference, search_domain_filter

## September 2025
- File attachment support (PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, RTF)
- Standalone Search API for raw results without LLM processing
- API key rotation mechanism with audit trails

## August 2025
- R1-1776 model removed (migrate to Sonar Pro Reasoning)

## July 2025
- Per-request cost breakdown in API responses
- SEC filings filter for financial research
